I have updated the design of both the **Tests Catalogue page (`/tests`)** and the **Details page (`/tests/[slug]`)** to match the structure, typography, buttons, and layout of your reference images:

### 1. Catalog Page Overhaul (`/tests`)
* **Horizontal Filter Bar**: Implemented the layout with the search input (`Search by test name, description or biomarkers...`), the category buttons container (`All`, `Tests`, `Packages` in a grey container), and the inline `Home Collection` toggle button with its house icon.
* **Redesigned Cards Layout**:
  * Removed header images to keep the list clean and lightweight.
  * Placed the badges at the top-left (`Test` pill, green house `Home Collection` icon, and red building `Lab Visit` icon).
  * Added the top-right green discount percentage text (e.g. `20% OFF`).
  * Styled titles in bold, uppercase slate, and placed a red clock icon below displaying the report timeline.
  * Added Biomarkers and "Includes Tests Like" capsules showing markers with `+N more` tags.
  * Implemented side-by-side CTA buttons at the bottom: an outline `View Info` button and a solid green `Book Now` button.

### 2. Detail Page Overhaul (`/tests/[slug]`)
* **Header**: Added the `< Back to Catalogue` navigation link in bold grey at the top-left.
* **Details Structure**:
  * **Left Column**: Wide laboratory image with bottom-floating border badges, large bold uppercase title, and full description text.
  * **Right Column (Pricing & Booking Sidebar)**: Created a sticky card with the `PRICING & BOOKING` label, price details (large price, crossed out price, and green percentage pill), a solid green `Book via WhatsApp` button, and an outline `Call Diagnostic Center` button.
  * **Report & Requirements Cards**: Added horizontal cards for `EXPECTED REPORTS` and `REQUIREMENTS` side-by-side using red clock and alert circle icons with light-red background circles.
  * **Biomarkers Tested Section**: Styled biomarkers with green circle checkmark check circles.
  * **Instructions**: Formatted pre-test clinical guidelines into clean bulleted list items.

The project compiles and generated static pages successfully. You can verify these changes live on your active `npm run dev` hot-reloading dev server!

I have completed the luxury visual redesign of the dynamic **Test & Package Catalogue** and **Detail views** to fully set them apart from the old CDM Scans style, matching Aaradhya Scans' premium brand aesthetics.

### What Was Changed

#### 1. Catalogue Directory Page (`/tests`)
* **Background Atmosphere**: Added glowing background backdrop blobs (`bg-brand-emerald/5` and `bg-brand-gold/5`) that animate softly in the background.
* **Luxury Heading**: Used a premium editorial combination styling:
  > *Clinical Diagnostic **Catalog** & Wellness **Packages**.*
* **Search & Filters**: Replaced generic grey elements with a thin-border input styled in brand colors, a custom golden slider toggle switch for Home Sample Collection, and pill buttons utilizing `bg-brand-emerald` for active states.
* **Premium Cards**:
  * Added a subtle vertical gold highlight stripe (`before:bg-brand-gold`) on the left border that activates on hover.
  * Re-styled diagnostic type badges (`Package` in copper-gold outline, `Test` in emerald outline).
  * Styled the discount tag in gold text with a subtle background border wrapper at the top right.
  * Overhauled standard buttons into a minimalist text outline for `View Info` and a fully rounded pill button in `bg-brand-emerald` for `Book Now`.

#### 2. Detail Guidelines Page (`/tests/[slug]`)
* **Atmosphere**: Integrated the same floating glow backdrops for a unified experience.
* **Badges & Hero**: Positioned the badges overlapping the bottom left of the image container with clean white background borders (`bg-brand-white text-brand-charcoal` / `text-brand-emerald` / `text-brand-gold-dark`).
* **Expected Reports & Requirements Cards**: Re-styled these side-by-side elements into premium card boxes with `bg-brand-emerald/5` and `bg-brand-gold/5` backgrounds and matching custom border tints.
* **Biomarkers Tested Checklist**: Renders checklist circles with emerald icons in separate border cards (`bg-brand-cream/30 border-brand-charcoal/5`).
* **Pricing & Booking Sidebar**:
  * Styled the pricing card with brand details, including a gold percentage discount tag.
  * Replaced square CTA buttons with highly polished rounded pill buttons (`bg-brand-emerald` for WhatsApp, and a custom hover outline for the telephone dialer).

The optimized production build compiles and generates static files cleanly. The updates are live and active on your local dev server!

## 🏷️ Test Parameters (Biomarkers) Tag Input System
Admins can now easily manage parameters tested for any diagnostic test via the admin dashboard:
* **Interactive Tag-like UI**: In the Edit/Create Test modal, admins can type parameter names (e.g. `Hemoglobin`, `RBC Count`, etc.) and press **Enter** or click **Add**.

* **Dismissable Tags**: Active tags render with clean branding styles (light green accents) and a small `×` close button to remove them.
* **Direct Database Sync**: Biomarkers map directly to the `biomarkers` array payload in Firestore and reflect instantly in the public facing dynamic list."

I have successfully implemented the interactive tag-like input system for test parameters/biomarkers in the Aaradhya Scans administrative control panel.

### Summary of Changes

1. **State & Event Management**:
   * Added `biomarkers` (string array) and `biomarkerInput` (string) state hooks inside the `TabTests` component in [admin/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/admin/page.tsx).
   * Created helper functions (`addBiomarker`, `removeBiomarker`, `handleBiomarkerKeyDown`) to handle adding and deleting parameter tags.
   * Intercepted `Enter` keystrokes in the tag input field via `handleBiomarkerKeyDown` and executed `e.preventDefault()` to ensure adding a tag doesn't accidentally trigger a premature form submission.

2. **Form Sync & Reset**:
   * Overhauled the `resetForm` logic to clear the biomarker states upon cancellation or success.
   * Modified the `handleEdit` callback to dynamically pre-populate the active parameters list whenever an existing test is edited.
   * Bound the payload in `handleSubmit` to transmit the live `biomarkers` tag array to the Firestore database upon saving.

3. **Premium UI/UX Design**:
   * Inserted a beautiful Parameters input section below the patient preparation guidelines.
   * Active tags render as elegant, dismissible pill badges with emerald brand coloring (`bg-brand-emerald/10 text-brand-emerald border-brand-emerald/10`) and a remove icon (`×`) next to each label.

4. **Walkthrough Documentation**:
   * Documented the new test parameters tag system within the project [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/moham/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/eca482d2-ed81-43a9-b689-e9c59b0791ae/walkthrough.md).
   * Verified that the local development environment compiles and builds successfully with `next build`.

I have successfully implemented the category-wise test grouping input system for health packages, matching your reference design exactly.

### Summary of Changes

1. **State Management for Package Categories**:
   * Added state variables `includedCategories` (matching the exported `PackageCategory` interface in `types.ts`), `categoryInput`, and a dictionary state `categoryTestInputs` inside the `TabPackages` component in [admin/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya Scans/src/app/admin/page.tsx).
   * Developed logic to handle adding custom categories (`addCategory`), deleting categories (`removeCategory`), adding test tags to individual categories (`addTestToCategory`), and deleting individual tags (`removeTestFromCategory`).
   * Configured `handleCategoryKeyDown` and `handleCategoryTestKeyDown` to prevent `Enter` key presses from triggering package form submissions.

2. **Form Reset and Edit Bindings**:
   * Modified `resetForm` in `TabPackages` to completely clear category lists and inputs when cancelling or saving.
   * Overhauled `handleEdit` to dynamically retrieve the `includedCategories` array payload from Firestore, rendering the category and tags structure instantly on dashboard load.
   * Synced `includedCategories` directly to the `handleSubmit` payload to synchronize database updates.

3. **Premium UI/UX (Matching Reference Screenshots)**:
   * **Category Section Builder**: Designed an elegant builder containing a category name input field and a solid green `+ Add Category` action button.
   * **Categorized Card Decks**: Each category renders as a distinct, rounded card block showing a bullet bullet indicator (`• Category Name`) and a delete trash icon on the header.
   * **Dismissable Test Badges**: Shows active tests grouped under their category with close buttons (`×`), alongside an inline custom add input widget.

The application compiles successfully and page optimization completes correctly. All parameters are saved dynamically to Firestore and reflect instantly in the accordion items on the dynamic detail views (`/tests/[slug]`).

105: ## 🏷️ Test Parameters (Biomarkers) Tag Input System
106: Admins can now easily manage parameters tested for any diagnostic test via the admin dashboard:
107: * **Interactive Tag-like UI**: In the Edit/Create Test modal, admins can type parameter names (e.g. `Hemoglobin`, `RBC Count`, etc.) and press **Enter** or click **Add**.

109: * **Dismissable Tags**: Active tags render with clean branding styles (light green accents) and a small `×` close button to remove them.

I have converted the **Included Tests** field in the test package form from a standard comma-separated text input into the interactive tag-based input system.

### Summary of Changes

1. **State Conversions**:
   * Removed the old `includedTestsText` string hook and replaced it with `includedTests` (string array state) and `includedTestInput` (string input field state) inside `TabPackages` in [admin/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/admin/page.tsx).
   * Declared the helper actions: `addIncludedTest` (with unique checks), `removeIncludedTest` (filter key mutations), and `handleIncludedTestKeyDown` (restricting `Enter` triggers from submitting the parent form).

2. **Clean State Operations**:
   * Modified `resetForm` to clear both `includedTests` and the active input state.
   * Modified `handleEdit` to populate existing database values from `pkg.includedTests` as tags.
   * Directly bound `includedTests` (the tag array) to the Firestore upload payload in `handleSubmit`.

3. **Refinement of UI Structure**:
   * Replaced the comma-separated text input in the package edit modal with a flex tag list container and input box matching the biomarkers input field layout. Added tests are rendered as emerald-rimmed dismissible pills with close buttons (`×`).

Production build compilations complete successfully, confirming a solid database interface mapping.

The root cause appears to be the length of the tab labels ("All Diagnostics", "Standard Tests", "Wellness Packages"), which, when combined with the mobile `flex flex-wrap gap-2` CSS classes, are causing the items to wrap onto individual rows.

3. **Optimized Card Grid Density**:
   * Tightened card grid gaps (`gap-6 sm:gap-8`) and interior padding (`p-5 sm:p-7`) on mobile screens to decrease excess whitespace.

**Designing a Services Page** I'm moving away from a split-screen detail view for `/services`. The goal is now a premium, user-friendly layout. I'm focusing on a more elegant visual structure as a key element of the design. My priorities include replacing the master-detail layout with something more modern and intuitive. **Refining the Card Design** I'm now zeroing in on a card-based layout for the services page. The concept is an editorial grid of visual cards, filterable by category. Each card features a category header with a gold accent, the service name, and a brief description. Below that, I envision collapsible sections for prep guidelines, who needs the service, and clinical benefits. Interactive inline expansions are key. Each card will have an image frame and a WhatsApp CTA for scheduling, plus a link to view diagnostic tests. The goal is elegant simplicity and high user-friendliness. **Implementing the Card Component** I'm now building the card component itself. I've got the basic structure for a service card, including decorative accents. I'm focusing on making it a visually engaging and expandable element. I've added the category header, service name, and short description, alongside image placeholders. The collapsible details section, triggered by the `isExpanded` state, is my current focus. **Optimizing the Card Component** I've just refined the card's action triggers. I have redesigned the **Services Catalog** page [src/app/services/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/services/page.tsx) to eliminate the complex split master-detail panel, replacing it with an editorial grid layout.

### Summary of Changes

1. **Simplified Responsive Grid**:
   * Removed the busy split-pane dashboard format in favor of a clean, premium grid of independent diagnostic cards (`grid gap-6 sm:gap-8 grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`).

2. **Interactive Collapsible Details**:
   * Integrated smooth, inline dropdown collapsibles within each card powered by Framer Motion (`AnimatePresence` + `height: 'auto'`). Clicking **"Show Details"** opens up guidelines, target patients, and clinical benefit lists inline, preventing visual overload.

3. **User-Friendly Navigation & Calls to Action**:
   * Added direct **"Schedule via WhatsApp"** buttons inside the card footers.
   * Placed **"View Pricing"** links that navigate straight to the dynamic catalog (`/tests`) pre-filtered by the chosen service query, giving patients immediate path-to-purchase access.

I have created a dedicated, standalone details page for each diagnostic service.

### Summary of Changes

1. **Dedicated Service Route**:
   * Created a dynamic details page at [src/app/services/[id]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/services/%5Bid%5D/page.tsx) to match the dynamic routing schema (`/services/[id]`, e.g., `/services/ultrasound`).
   * Renders clinical equipment headers, patient preparation guidelines, target groups, procedural timelines, diagnostic FAQs, and a sticky WhatsApp scheduling panel.

2. **Clean Navigation Linkage**:
   * Added a **"Learn More"** action link to the footer of each card on the main [services directory](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/services/page.tsx) that navigates directly to the service's standalone detail page.
   * Converted the old inline toggle to **"Quick View"**, giving users the choice to either peek at key instructions inline or click through for a dedicated, immersive guidelines breakdown.

The Turbopack production compilation build completed successfully without errors.

To solve this, I have renamed the regenerated asset on disk to `premium_sonomammography_v2.png` and updated all file references accordingly. This forces the browser to discard the old cache and load the new image immediately.

2. **Updated Mappings & References**:
   * Updated the services catalog list in [src/app/services/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/services/page.tsx#L22) to use `premium_sonomammography_v2.png`.
   * Updated the service detail page dynamic router in [src/app/services/[id]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/services/%5Bid%5D/page.tsx#L22) to use `premium_sonomammography_v2.png`.
   * Updated the tests catalog helper in [src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/%5Bslug%5D/page.tsx#L35) to map sonomammography checks directly to the new `premium_sonomammography_v2.png` asset.

In the application, the `featured` attribute on checkup packages is defined in the types system as `featured?: boolean;` and has the following functionality:

### 1. Admin Control & Database Flag:
* In the **Admin Dashboard** (`/admin`), when creating or editing a checkup package, there is a toggle checkbox labeled:
  > **Featured Package (Highlights listing on dynamic searches)**
* Saving the package with this toggle checked writes `featured: true` to the package entry in Firestore.

### 2. Admin Interface Badge:
* Inside the admin checkup packages table view, packages with this flag enabled display a premium gold **`Featured`** badge next to their name for quick identification by the admin staff.

### 3. Public Catalog Status:
* The flag is stored in the Firestore database for future marketing expansion or search highlighting, but is **not currently used** to alter the layout or sorting order of the public catalog search page (`/tests`). All packages are currently displayed equally in the public listing.

+* **Coexistence of Flat and Categorized Tests**: Modified the rendering logic in `tests/[slug]/page.tsx` to handle checkup packages that contain both categorized test groups (e.g. Complete Blood Count) and flat/uncategorized individual tests (e.g. Computerised ECG) simultaneously.

The reason the **"Computerised ECG"** did not show up on the public checkup package detail page is due to a rendering conflict:
* Previously, the code used an *either/or* check (a ternary check): if a package had categorized groups (like `Complete Blood Count`), it would show only the categories accordion and ignore the flat/uncategorized test tags (like `Computerised ECG`) entirely.

I have updated the rendering layout to support both sections simultaneously.

### Summary of Fixes:
1. **Details Page Rendering Overhaul** in [src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/%5Bslug%5D/page.tsx#L277):
   * Split the checkup tests listing into two independent blocks.
   * If both categorized groups and individual flat test tags exist, the flat tests are now displayed directly underneath the accordions under a clean sub-heading: **"Other Included Tests"**.
2. **Catalog Deck Cards Previews Update** in [src/app/tests/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/page.tsx#L272):
   * Merged both categorized tests and flat individual test arrays when calculating the cards' short tests previews summary, ensuring that no tests are hidden from the search catalog view cards.

args.ReplacementContent:
"## 🏠 Homepage Featured Wellness Packages Section
* **Admin Selection (Firestore Flags)**: Added the `showOnHome` property to the package type schema. Admins can now toggle a checkbox in the control panel to feature/highlight specific checkup packages on the homepage list.
* **Dashboard Management**: Toggle states and package mapping updates are synced to Firestore database records, complete with a new `"Home Featured"` table badge for quick admin indexing.
* **Direct Table Row Toggle**: Added a Star button icon under the Actions column in the admin package list, allowing admins to toggle the featured homepage status of any package directly from the list table in one click.
* **Limit Validation (Max 6)**: Implemented validation to restrict the total number of packages featured on the homepage to a maximum of 6. If an administrator attempts to toggle a 7th package or save/create a package with the feature flag enabled when 6 are already featured, a toast error message is raised: `"Maximum of 6 packages can be featured on the homepage. Please unfeature another package first."` and the save or toggle update is cancelled.
* **Homepage Listing Deck**: Integrated a new dynamically loaded section *"Featured Wellness Packages"* on the main landing page directly below the Core Diagnostic Services grid. The section filters and renders high-fidelity package cards with prices, Turnaround times, included tests summaries, and instant WhatsApp booking triggers (only rendering if at least one package is flagged by the admin)."

Here is a summary of the visual improvements made to [src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx):

### 1. Immersive Dual-Panel Page Header
* **Organic Leaf Frame Layout**: The main scanner/lab image is enclosed in a rounded leaf-inspired visual container (`rounded-tl-[4rem] rounded-br-[4rem] rounded-tr-2xl rounded-bl-2xl`) with backdrop blur filters and floating availability labels.
* **Side-by-Side Presentation**: Title, metadata turnaround times, and descriptions are shifted to the right column of the header grid instead of stacked below the image, giving the screen a high-end, premium editorial feel.

### 2. Clinical Preparation Step Rows
* **Numbered Instruct-Cards**: Replaced standard bullet points in the "Pre-test Clinical Preparation" list with custom cards. Each guideline is now displayed inside a light cream row badge card featuring a gold-accented step index number (`1`, `2`, `3`).

### 3. Leaf-Shaped Booking Sidebar Card
* **Cohesive Visual Style**: Styled the sticky pricing/call-to-action sidebar to match the leaf visual system (`rounded-tl-[2.5rem] rounded-br-[2.5rem]`) and added a premium top color gradient accent bar.
* **Asymmetric Action Deck**: Unified the CTA actions with wide, distinct button elements (gradient green WhatsApp booking trigger and outlined phone link).

### 4. Custom Parameter Accordions & Biomarker Grids
* **Fine-Tuned Panels**: Standardized the checkup package accordions to expand into cards with gold checkbox-style bullets (`CheckCircle2`), creating a neat aesthetic.

Both the compiler check (`npx tsc --noEmit`) and routing paths completed successfully. The project checklist in [task.md](file:///C:/Users/moham/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/eca482d2-ed81-43a9-b689-e9c59b0791ae/task.md) and the project guide in [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/moham/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/eca482d2-ed81-43a9-b689-e9c59b0791ae/walkthrough.md) have been fully updated.

"# Responsive Admin Control Panel Implementation Plan

Optimize the Administrative Control Panel dashboard (`src/app/admin/page.tsx`) to render beautifully and operate efficiently on all viewports, including mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

## User Review Required

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Key Enhancements Overview**
> 1. **Container Padding Adjustments**: Outer paddings scale from `px-4 py-8` on mobile to `px-6 py-12 lg:py-16` on larger viewports.
> 2. **Flexible Headers**: Tab header blocks containing titles and actions (such as adding diagnostic tests or health packages) will stack vertically on mobile screens and align horizontally on tablet/desktop views.
> 3. **Form Formatting**: Form elements and action buttons (Cancel/Save) will scale dynamically. Form actions stack vertically to offer large, accessible touch targets on mobile.
> 4. **Scrollable Tables**: Listing tables will be wrapped in horizontal-scroll containers (`overflow-x-auto`) with a minimum width on the table itself to prevent data columns from squishing on narrow layouts.
> 5. **Categorized Inputs**: The nested package category addition controls inside Wellness Packages will adjust stack patterns on smaller viewports.

---

## Open Questions

*No open questions at this stage. The proposed styles leverage the application's existing Tailwind CSS utility framework.*

---

## Proposed Changes

### Admin Dashboard Pages

#### [MODIFY] [page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/admin/page.tsx)
* **Outer Container Padding**:
  * Update main background wrapper at line 73: `py-12 lg:py-16` -> `py-8 sm:py-12 lg:py-16`.
  * Update container wrapper at line 74: `px-6` -> `px-4 sm:px-6`.
* **Welcome Banner & operational summary padding**:
  * In `TabOverview`, update welcome container at line 212: `p-8` -> `p-5 sm:p-8`.
  * Update operational sync banner at line 248: `p-8` -> `p-5 sm:p-8`.
* **Tab 2: Diagnostic Tests Form & Catalog**:
  * Update tab header at lines 398–411 to stack vertically on mobile:

## 📱 Responsive Administrative Control Panel Overhaul
We have optimized the Admin Control Panel dashboard (`src/app/admin/page.tsx`) to make it fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens:
* **Responsive Outer & Inner Spacing**:
  * Outer viewports now use dynamic layout padding (`py-8 px-4 sm:py-12 sm:px-6 lg:py-16`) to maximize screen space on small mobile screens.
  * Form card panels and list catalogs use responsive inner padding (`p-5 sm:p-8`) to prevent wasted white space on mobile.
* **Flex/Stack Headers & CTAs**:
  * Tab title headers flex/stack dynamically (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4`) so buttons (like "Add Test" or "Add Package") sit cleanly beneath the text on mobile without squishing or clipping.
  * The "Add Test" and "Add Package" buttons leverage `self-start sm:self-auto` to prevent unnecessary full-width stretching.
* **Full-Width Mobile Form Action Footer**:
  * Action footers (Cancel/Save) stack vertically on mobile (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2.5`) and expand to full width (`w-full sm:w-auto`) to offer large, comfortable touch targets.
* **Add Category Controls Stack**:
  * Nested package category controls stack vertically on small screen widths (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2.5 items-stretch`) with full-width action inputs and buttons.
* **Horizontal scroll listing tables**:
  * Renders list tables inside responsive horizontal scrollable viewports (`overflow-x-auto w-full`).
  * Enforces minimum width rules on tables (`min-w-[700px]` for tests and `min-w-[800px]` for packages) so columns don't compress or overlap.
* **Admin Login Card Scaling**:
  * Scaled padding constraints down (`px-4 sm:px-6` outer, `p-6 sm:p-8` inner card) to render beautifully on mobile devices down to 320px width.
* **Verification**:
  * Verified successful code compilation with `npx tsc --noEmit` checks.
"

### Summary of Changes in [admin/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/admin/page.tsx)
1. **Dynamic Spacing**:
   * Scaled outer viewports to `py-8 px-4 sm:py-12 sm:px-6 lg:py-16` to leverage mobile horizontal and vertical space.
   * Tightened card container and list padding to `p-5 sm:p-8` so layout margins shrink cleanly on narrow screens.
2. **Responsive Headers**:
   * Overhauled tab titles and "Add Test"/"Add Package" headers to flex and stack vertically (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4`) on mobile, with buttons styled to `self-start sm:self-auto` to prevent unnecessary stretching.
3. **Full-Width Action Footers**:
   * Set Cancel and Save button rows to stack vertically on mobile (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2.5`) and expand to full width (`w-full sm:w-auto`) to provide accessible mobile tap targets.
4. **Stacked Category Inputs**:
   * Formatted package category addition grids to adjust into vertical stretch panels (`flex-col sm:flex-row gap-2.5 items-stretch`) on small screens.
5. **Horizontal Scrolling Tables**:
   * Wrapped the tests listing table and wellness packages listing table in scroll containers (`overflow-x-auto w-full`) and set minimum widths (`min-w-[700px]` and `min-w-[800px]` respectively) to guarantee readability without overlapping columns.
6. **Mobile Login Screen Layout**:
   * Reduced login viewport padding to `px-4 sm:px-6` and card interior padding to `p-6 sm:p-8` to fit small screen sizes down to 320px cleanly.

### Verification

"## 📱 Permanent Card Squishing Layout Fix (Tests and Packages Cards)
We have optimized the card layout footer and header in `page.tsx`, `tests/page.tsx`, and `tests/[slug]/page.tsx` across all viewport sizes (mobile, tablet, and desktop):
* **Permanently Stacked Pricing & Actions Footer**:
  * Because card grids split columns (resulting in narrow ~300px individual card boxes even on desktop viewports), we updated the layout to permanently stack the price and actions block vertically (`flex flex-col gap-3.5`).
  * Price details are displayed inside a full-width block containing a neat border separator (`border-b border-brand-charcoal/5 pb-2`).
  * Action buttons (`Details` link and `Book Now` button) take up the full horizontal width and are separated cleanly (`flex items-center justify-between gap-3 w-full`).
* **Separated Header Badges**:
  * Added a bullet point `•` separator inside the Home & Lab availability badge container (`flex items-center gap-1.5`) when both are available, ensuring clean visual separation.
* **Verification**:
  * Confirmed clean TypeScript verification with no syntax or compiler errors.
"

I have fixed the card footer layout for **both desktop and mobile screens** inside the main page, catalog directory, and related recommendations.

### Root Cause
Because these card containers are displayed inside a 3-column grid (`grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3`), the card width is **always narrow** (roughly ~300px) on both desktop viewports and mobile screens. Having the price, details link, and a booking button side-by-side on a single line causes overlapping and squishing.

### Solution Applied:
1. **Universal Stacked Footer**:
   * Removed responsive media queries (`sm:`) to enforce a stacked layout permanently across all device screens.
   * Renders the price title and value inside a clean top row with a light divider line (`border-b border-brand-charcoal/5 pb-2`).
   * Placed action items (`Details` and `Book Now`) side-by-side on the bottom row, allowing them to expand and fit cleanly without touching.
2. **Synchronized Files**:
   * [src/app/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/page.tsx) (Homepage featured wellness cards)
   * [src/app/tests/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/page.tsx) (Main directory cards)
   * [src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx](file:///d:/All%20Projects/Aaradhya%20Scans/src/app/tests/[slug]/page.tsx) (Related recommendations cards)
3. **Compilation Check**:
   * Verified with `npx tsc --noEmit` and confirmed compiling completes successfully with **no errors**.
   * Updated [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/moham/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/eca482d2-ed81-43a9-b689-e9c59b0791ae/walkthrough.md) and [task.md](file:///C:/Users/moham/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/eca482d2-ed81-43a9-b689-e9c59b0791ae/task.md).
